description_long: This is a modern L-shaped chaise upholstered in dark brown leather, featuring a three-seat main section with a right-side extended lounge. The backrest is straight and segmented into three distinct, plush cushions, providing ample support and comfort. The armrest is present only on the right side, matching the height of the backrest and offering a clean, boxy silhouette. The legs are short, straight, and likely made of dark-finished wood or metal, giving the piece a slightly elevated stance. The upholstery is smooth and solid, with no visible patterns or tufting, contributing to a sleek, contemporary appearance. The overall design is functional and stylish, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern, dark brown leather L-shaped chaise with a right-side lounge, segmented backrest, and a single right armrest. It features smooth upholstery and short, straight legs for a sleek, contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three-seat section, right-side lounge extension, segmented backrest, and single right armrest.
description_view_1: Right-side view highlighting the depth of the lounge extension and the height of the backrest and armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the backrest and the clean, uninterrupted back panel.
description_view_3: Left-side view showing the absence of an armrest on this side and the profile of the lounge extension.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is straight, medium-height, and divided into three plush, rectangular segments, each corresponding to a seat. It is smooth and unadorned, with no visible tufting or decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: A single armrest is present on the right side, matching the backrest's height and featuring a boxy, straight design.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, straight, and slender, likely made of dark-finished wood or metal, with a simple, modern appearance and no decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid dark brown leather with a smooth, untextured surface and no visible patterns, tufting, or quilting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are three large, attached back cushions aligned with the seating area and a single seat cushion extending into the lounge section, all integrated into the frame for a seamless look.
